# tasks-panel

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Toolbar button that toggles the task pane (tree + detail) for the conversation's task.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Conversation.ActionBar` → `TasksButton`
  - Uses: `conversations.useConversationById`, `conversations/conversation-view.conversationPane`, `conversations/conversation-view/action-bar.Conversation`, `primitives/css/status-dot.StatusDot`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`, `tasks.useTask`, `tasks/task-detail.taskDetailPane`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
